channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download WPS Office - PDF, Word, Excel, PPT 18.25.1 build 1567
item.description: WPS Office is a mobile office suite app that allows users to view, edit and create documents, spreadsheets, and presentations on their Android device. The app is available for download from the Google Play Store and is compatible with a wide range of file formats, including Microsoft Office documents. WPS Office - Free Office suite for Word, PDF, Excel, is an all-in-one office suite that integrates Word, PDF, Excel, PowerPoint, Forms, Cloud Storage, Online Editing, Template library and...

item.title: Download Save Location GPS 10.3
item.description: Save your favorite places. Never forget where you parked your car. Share important locations with your friends or colleagues. Visiting a new friend for the first time? The Save Location app will quickly display and save location details with pinpoint accuracy so you can refer to it later for your next visit! All location data can be saved within the app for reference from other devices, all with security to ensure only you and the people you want to see your location data with can...

item.title: Download PDF Scanner App: Document Scan 2.05
item.description: PDF Scanner - Document Scanner is a free scanner app that scans documents with your device using Camera Scanner to scan PDF and open PDF documents with this smart scanner app. Scan documents anytime, anywhere. Document scanner allows you to scan any type of document. Turn your smartphone into a real multi-function camera scanner. Document scanner convert your paper documents into PDF/JPG with just one tap with this free document scanner app. Document scanner is the ability to keep all...

item.title: Download Adobe Photoshop Express Photo Editor 18.0.25 build 1998
item.description: Adobe Photoshop Express is a mobile photo editing app that allows users to edit photos quickly and easily on their Android devices. Join millions of creators who trust and use Adobe Photoshop Express, one of the best photo editors and collage makers on Android for fast, easy, and powerful editing on mobile devices. Premium version / No Adobe ID account required Features of Adobe Photoshop Express APK Basic photo editing: Users can crop, rotate, adjust brightness, contrast and...

item.title: Download PhotoDirector: AI Photo Editor 20.12.1
item.description: PhotoDirector is a photo editing app for Android devices that allows you to edit and enhance your photos with a variety of tools and effects. With PhotoDirector, you can adjust your photo's color and lighting, remove blemishes and other imperfections, and apply filters to give your photos a unique look. You can also use PhotoDirector to create photo collages and slideshows, add text and stickers to photos, and share your edited photos on social networks or through other sharing...

item.title: Download OsmAnd+ — Maps & GPS Offline 5.3.3
item.description: OsmAnd+ (OSM Automatic Navigation Directions) is a mapping and navigation application with access to free, global, and high-quality OpenStreetMap (OSM) data. Enjoy voice and optical navigation, view POIs (points of interest), create and manage GPX routes, use contour visualization and elevation information, choose between driving modes, cyclists, pedestrians, OSM editing, etc. This is a mobile navigation app that uses OpenStreetMap (OSM) data to provide users with detailed maps and...

item.title: Download Weather Live Wallpapers 2.31.0
item.description: The movement of the sun, rainfall and phases of the moon are realistic animations on the screen with beautifully crafted details. The picturesque landscape reflects the weather with astonishing accuracy. Enjoy the sunrise, the rainbow, the birds singing and all the bright sunshine! You can use real weather apps as wallpaper on your screen, they will reflect the current weather and you will always know the weather conditions. You can also launch the weather app in a window or install a...

item.title: Download Lucky Patcher 12.10.2
item.description: Lucky Patcher is a free Android app that can modify many apps and games, Block ads, remove unwanted system apps, backup apps before and after modification, Move apps apps to SD card, remove license verification from paid apps and games, etc. Lucky Patcher features and details: Remove or block ads on Android apps and games. You can easily block ads with Lucky Patcher. Block in-app purchase verification with the app. You can use premium apps and games for free by removing in-app...

item.title: Download Volume Control 6.7.4
item.description: Volume Control is a great app that lets you control your device's volume – instead of being controlled by it! Simply adjust existing volume profiles or create new predefined volume profiles and switch between them with a single tap. Individual profiles include: Alarm, Media, Ringer, Notifications, Voice (in-call), Bluetooth, and overall system volume. Volume Control Features Volume control also detects when you plug in headphones or activate Bluetooth and automatically switches to...

item.title: Download ToonMe - cartoons from photos 0.7.20
item.description: Automatically redraw your portrait in an animation or vector style using the magic of artificial intelligence in Toonme. What takes a few days to create and can only be ordered from professional painters can only be done by one touch, turning you into your own digital artist. With this application, you can customize your own photo art with all kinds of photo editing effects. Suppose you have a beautiful picture, but you don't like the background? Toonme will help you! This excellent...

item.title: Download Toolmaps 5.70
item.description: Toolmaps for Google Maps to highlight, edit and capture maps from Google Maps. Maps from Google Maps are displayed in full screen or immersive mode without any intervening objects. You can add and edit polylines, polygons, rectangles, circles and markers. You can also add colored text, resize and rotate them All colors support transparency. Other features calculate perimeter and area of ​​polygons calculate distance between two points import / export to kml format easy...

item.title: Download CalcKit: All-In-One Calculator 8.1.0
item.description: CalcKit is a multifunctional calculator application for mobile devices. It provides a convenient and flexible way to perform mathematical calculations on your phone or tablet. Designed with simplicity in mind, CalcKit helps you solve all kinds of everyday calculations. From simple and complex calculations to unit and currency conversions, percentages, areas, volumes, etc. Passionate development combined with continuous feedback from users has created what we believe is the best...

item.title: Download StbEmu (Pro) 2.0.21.00
item.description: StbEmu is an application for Android 5.0+, allowing downloading IPTV web portals, designed to run on IPTV STB (Set-Top-Box), on devices running Android, such as phones, tablets tablets and TV boxes. Currently, the application supports simulation of many STBs created by the Ukrainian company Infomir, such as MAG 250, MAG 270 or MAG 322. StbEmu (Pro) for IPTV: Remember that this application is configured for a demo IPTV portal for testing purposes. If you want to use the app, you must...

item.title: Download Reverso Translate and Learn 15.4.1
item.description: Reverso is a comprehensive tool that helps you get high-quality translations and continuously improve your language skills. The best part about the Reverso app? It is available for free. Teachers or translators, students or business professionals, beginners or advanced learners use Reverso to enrich their vocabulary and read, write and speak more accurately and confidently. Download the Reverso app and you'll have millions of words and expressions at your fingertips, with their...

item.title: Download ASR Voice Recorder v547
item.description: ASR Voice Recorder is an Android app that allows you to record audio using your phone's microphone. It can be used to record lectures, meetings, interviews, and other audio events. This app supports a variety of audio formats, including MP3, WAV, and FLAC, and allows you to adjust the sound quality and bitrate to suit your needs. ASR Voice Recorder Features Many recording formats such as MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, M4A, AMR Support cloud upload integration (Pro) for Google Drive, Dropbox,...

item.title: Download Your Calendar Widget 1.70.9
item.description: Your Calendar Widget is an app that provides a customizable calendar widget for Android devices. The app allows users to view their upcoming events and appointments directly from their device's home screen. It shows your upcoming events. You can easily configure and adjust the widget according to your needs. Each widget has its own configuration. This allows you to have several widgets with different display and calendar settings. Features of Your Calendar Widget Widgets can be used...

item.title: Download YoWindow Weather - Unlimited 2.58.0
item.description: YoWindow is a unique new weather app. The magic of YoWindow is a living landscape that reflects your real-life weather. For example, if it rains - it will rain in YoWindow. Sunset and sunrise in YoWindow take place at the same time as in real life. But the cool thing is you can roll time forward. Just swipe the screen and you'll see how the weather changes throughout the day. YoWindow Weather Features - Unlimited All the weather at your fingertips. You see the current weather,...

item.title: Download Resume Builder: CV maker PDF 6.3.4
item.description: Resume Builder - CV Maker is a mobile application that allows you to create a professional resume or CV (curriculum vitae) on your smartphone or tablet. The app typically includes features like templates for creating resumes, options for customizing layout and design, and tools for adding text and formatting documents. Some resume creation apps may also let you save and export your completed resume in a variety of formats, such as a PDF or Word document. A job-perfect resume template is...

item.title: Download ASICS Runkeeper - Run Tracker 16.23
item.description: Join a community that helps people escape difficulties and stick with running forever! Track your workouts, set goals, sweat, and see your progress. Whether you're trying to track a 5K goal or train for a marathon, use the GPS app trusted by 50 million users and counting. ASICS Runkeeper - Run Tracker is a mobile application that allows users to track running and fitness activities on their Android devices. The app uses GPS to track the user's distance, pace, and running time as well as...

item.title: Download Edge Gestures 1.16.2
item.description: Edge Gestures is an Android app that lets you use gestures to perform various actions on your device. Now you can do something quickly with just a simple gesture on the edge of the screen. It supports tap, double-tap, press and hold, swipe from the edge, and drag and slide. To use Edge Gestures, you need to install the app on your Android device and then enable the feature in the app's settings. Once you set up Edge Gestures, you can use gestures to navigate your device and perform...

item.title: Download Polarr: Photo Filters & Editor 6.12.0
item.description: Polarr: Photo Filters & Editor is a mobile application for editing and enhancing photos on Android and iOS devices. It offers a wide range of editing tools, including basic adjustments like cropping, rotation, and brightness control, as well as advanced features like color grading, masking, and layer-based editing. . The app also includes many filters and presets that can be used to change the look of your photos. Polar Features: Filters & Photo Editor Basic adjustments:...

item.title: Download Beelinguapp Language Audiobook 3.268
item.description: Learn languages ​​by reading content you love using our parallel text method for all levels of experience - from beginners to experts! Read stories in two languages ​​at the same time, listen to audio. Learn a new language with Beelinguapp, an application that helps you read stories in many different languages ​​in parallel. Listen to the audio in your target language and read the text in both your native language and target language for reference. Read your favorite...

item.title: Download AppMgr Pro III (App 2 SD) 6.12
item.description: AppMgr is a completely new design app that offers the following components: Move apps: move apps to internal or external storage for more available app storage, Hide apps : hide system (built-in) apps from the app drawer, Freeze Apps: freeze apps so they don't use any CPU or memory resources, App Manager: manage apps to batch uninstall, move apps or share apps with friends, More than 30,000,000 downloads! In addition, AppMgr Pro III also has a "Freeze Apps" feature where you can freeze...

item.title: Download Mstudio: Audio & Music Editor 5.0.8
item.description: Mstudio is the most advanced and amazing Music Editor! This gives you advanced control and professional audio editing features with Mp3 cutter, Mp3 Player, Mp3 Merger, Mp3 Mixer, Mp3 Extractor, Change Tempo, Change pitch converter, Mp3 Converter, Mp3 Mutter, Mp3 Omitter, Mp3 Splitter. It's a music hub that has all the features you could want in a single app. Some features of Mstudio Mp3 Player: Easily browse and play songs by song, album, artist and folder. Music & Mp3 Player...

item.title: Download Elevate - Brain Training Games 5.234.1
item.description: Elevate is a brain training program designed to improve speech, processing speed, memory skills, mental math, and more. Each person is provided with their own personalized learning program, which is adjusted over time to maximize results. The more you practice with Elevate, the more you'll improve key cognitive skills proven to increase productivity, earning potential, and confidence. More than 90% said their vocabulary, memory, math skills and overall acuity improved when they...
